pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 42-68 attempt to INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE using table names and column names that don't exist in the Northwind schema

privileged_info_summary: The Northwind database source is legitimate and real (not synthetic) - it's the classic Microsoft Northwind sample database converted to SQLite3, available at https://github.com/jpwhite3/northwind-SQLite3. However, critical metadata errors exist: (1) The setup script tries to download from a non-existent URL (Northwind_large.sql returns HTTP 404; the actual file is src/create.sql), (2) The metadata claims table names are 'Product', 'Customer', 'Category', 'OrderDetail' but the actual Northwind schema uses 'Products', 'Customers', 'Categories', 'Order Details', (3) The setup script uses incorrect column names (e.g., 'Id' instead of 'ProductID', 'SupplierId' instead of 'SupplierID') that don't exist in the actual Northwind schema. The setup script will fail to execute due to these fundamental schema mismatches.
